fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationAxis` describes a single OpenType variable font axis. Use
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.GetVariationDesignParameters> to retrieve all axes for a typeface.

Each axis has a four-byte tag (e.g., `wght` for weight, `wdth` for width) and a range defined
by <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis.Min>, <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis.Default>,
and <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis.Max>. Hidden axes should generally not be exposed to
end users.
]]></format>
fields.summary: Describes a single axis of an OpenType variable font.

fields.value: The default design coordinate value used when no explicit position is specified.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the default design-space value for this axis.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if all fields are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified object is an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> with equal field values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> instance.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.returns: A hash code for the current instance.
fields.summary: Returns a hash code for the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> instance.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if this axis is marked as hidden (the HIDDEN_AXIS flag is set); otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this axis is hidden from end-user interfaces.
Gets or sets the maximum design-space value for this axis.
Gets or sets the minimum design-space value for this axis.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if all fields of both values are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> values are equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis left, SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis right);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if any field differs between the two values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> values are not equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis left, SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis right);

fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> for this axis, for example <c>wght</c> for the weight axis.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the four-byte OpenType tag that identifies this variation axis.
